unitName: 貓咪生病的那天 | The day my cat got sick

article.title: The day my cat got sick 貓咪生病的那天

paragraphs.english: My cat Molly got sick. It happened suddenly. One day she was happy and lively, but the next day she looked terrible.
sentences: One day she was happy and lively, but the next day she looked terrible.
paragraphs.translation: 🌐 我的貓莫莉生病了。事情發生得很突然。前一天她還高高興興、充滿活力，但第二天她看起來很糟。
translation_sentences: 前一天她還高高興興、充滿活力，但第二天她看起來很糟。

implication.english: 💡 The sudden change in the cat's condition is highlighted, creating concern.
implication.chinese: 💡 貓咪狀況突然改變，引起擔憂。[換句話說]：莫莉突然就病了，前一天還好好的，隔天就沒精神。

paragraphs.english: I called her name, but she didn't move. I offered her some food. She sniffed at her bowl, but then turned away. That's when I got really scared.
sentences: I called her name, but she didn't move.
She sniffed at her bowl, but then turned away.
That's when I got really scared.
paragraphs.translation: 🌐 我叫她的名字，但她不動。我給她一些食物。她聞了聞碗，然後轉開頭。那時我真的害怕了。
translation_sentences: 🌐 我叫她的名字，但她不動。
她聞了聞碗，然後轉開頭。

implication.english: 💡 The cat's lack of response to food is a worrying sign, escalating the narrator's fear.
implication.chinese: 💡 貓對食物沒反應是個令人擔憂的跡象，加劇了敘述者的恐懼。[換句話說]：我叫牠也不理，拿食物給牠，牠聞一聞就不吃了，我開始覺得不對勁。

paragraphs.english: Dad and I decided to go to the vet right away. 'What should we do?' I asked the vet. 'Give her this medicine and let her have more rest,' said the vet.
sentences: Dad and I decided to go to the vet right away.
'What should we do?' I asked the vet.
'Give her this medicine and let her have more rest,' said the vet.
paragraphs.translation: 🌐 爸爸和我決定立刻去看獸醫。「我們該怎麼辦？」我問獸醫。「給她吃這個藥，讓她多休息，」獸醫說。
translation_sentences: 🌐 爸爸和我決定立刻去看獸醫。
「給她吃這個藥，讓她多休息，」獸醫說。

implication.english: 💡 The family takes prompt action by going to the vet, who prescribes medicine and rest.
implication.chinese: 💡 家人迅速採取行動去看獸醫，獸醫開藥並建議多休息。[換句話說]：我們趕快帶牠去看醫生，醫生說要吃藥多休息。

paragraphs.english: When we got home, I tried to cheer Molly up. I wanted to play with her, but I knew she needed more rest. I watched her all day long. I even checked on her a few times during the night.
sentences: When we got home, I tried to cheer Molly up.
I wanted to play with her, but I knew she needed more rest.
I watched her all day long.
I even checked on her a few times during the night.
paragraphs.translation: 🌐 回家後，我試著讓莫莉開心起來。我想和她玩，但我知道她需要更多休息。我看她一整天。我甚至晚上還看了她好幾次。
translation_sentences: 🌐 回家後，我試著讓莫莉開心起來。
我想和她玩，但我知道她需要更多休息。
我甚至晚上還看了她好幾次。

implication.english: 💡 The narrator's concern is shown through constant attention and checking on the cat.
implication.chinese: 💡 敘述者的關心透過持續關注和查看貓咪表現出來。[換句話說]：我很擔心，整天陪著牠，晚上也不時起來看牠。

paragraphs.english: The next morning, Molly jumped onto my bed. She was much better! I kissed her head and smiled.
sentences: The next morning, Molly jumped onto my bed.
I kissed her head and smiled.
paragraphs.translation: 🌐 第二天早上，莫莉跳上我的床。她好多了！我親了親她的頭，笑了。
translation_sentences: 🌐 第二天早上，莫莉跳上我的床。

implication.english: 💡 Happy ending: the cat recovers, bringing relief and joy.
implication.chinese: 💡 快樂結局：貓康復了，帶來解脫和喜悅。[換句話說]：隔天早上牠跳上床，看起來好多了，我終於放心了。
